film.title: The Edge
film.overview: The plane carrying wealthy Charles Morse crashes down in the Alaskan wilderness. Together with the two other passengers, photographer Robert and assistant Stephen, Charles devises a plan to help them reach civilization. However, his biggest obstacle might not be the elements, or even the Kodiak bear stalking them -- it could be Robert, whom Charles suspects is having an affair with his wife and would not mind seeing him dead.

dialogues.dialogue: What the f**k does that mean? ! What? !  I once read an interesting book.  It said that most people lost in the wilds... ... they die of shame.  ... they die of shame.  What?
